answers.q6: Read the contents carefully, do not click on the link, delete the SMS, and report it if needed.
answers.q7: Do not click or close it. Take a screenshot, disconnect from the internet if needed, and report it to IT or security staff.
answers.q8: Stop using the computer immediately, do not type any passwords, disconnect from the internet, and report it to IT or security staff.
answers.q9: Do not enter username, password, OTP, or personal details. Do not click anything else, take a screenshot of the URL, disconnect if needed, and report it.
answers.q10: Do not download or open the attachment. Verify the sender through the official website or phone, take a screenshot, keep evidence, and report it.
answers.q14: C. To help in investigation if needed later
answers.q22: B. What happened; Date & Time; Contact details; Supporting evidence
answers.q23: C. Whether the report contains sufficient details and supporting evidence
answers.q25: B. Screenshots of the conversation and transaction receipt
